description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style axe featuring a robust, black metallic handle with intricate mechanical detailing and a prominent, semi-circular blade. The blade is thick, with a slightly convex edge and reinforced with visible bolts or rivets along its mounting, suggesting durability and strength. The handle is straight with a textured grip and a looped, reinforced section near the head for enhanced control or attachment. The axe head is asymmetrical, with one side housing the blade and the opposite side featuring a mechanical or reinforced structure, possibly for multi-purpose use. The overall design is industrial and utilitarian, with a matte black finish and metallic highlights. This axe would be suitable for heavy-duty urban tasks, emergency response, or as a specialized tool in a garage or workshop.
description: A modern, tactical black axe with a semi-circular blade, reinforced handle, and industrial mechanical detailing. The design is robust and utilitarian, suited for heavy-duty urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full semi-circular blade, handle grip, and mechanical details near the head.
description_view_1: Edge-on view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the blade's thickness, mounting bolts, and the reinforced handle structure.
description_view_3: Rear edge-on view showing the handle's end and the mechanical structure behind the blade.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, black metallic handle with textured polymer grip and a reinforced loop near the head; cylindrical cross-section with mechanical detailing.
attribute_blade_design: Semi-circular, thick blade with a convex edge, reinforced by bolts or rivets; single-edged with a robust, industrial appearance.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, bolted and reinforced mounting with visible mechanical fasteners.
